hero.lead: Self-host an autonomous MCP gateway. Bring your own LLM, run fully offline (with a local LLM), and keep every byte on your infrastructure. AGPLv3.
hero.meta: AGPLv3  ·  Bring your own LLM  ·  Run fully offline (with a local LLM)
hero.title: One
hero.subtitle: Self-host an autonomous MCP gateway. Bring your own LLM, run fully offline with a local LLM, keep every byte on your infrastructure. No vendor lock-in, ever.

items.l: Run fully offline (with a local LLM)

problem.title: Every server, every device, every credential
problem.lead: As soon as a team adopts more than a couple of MCP servers, configuration sprawl and access risk explode. BigMCP collapses it into one governed gateway you run yourself.
withoutItems: Install & update MCP servers on every device
No access control over who runs which tool
Zero visibility into who used what, when
Re-do the whole setup for each new teammate
withItems: One governed endpoint for every connected tool
Credentials encrypted at rest (Fernet) — User › Org › Server
RBAC across 4 roles, scoped per Tool Group

howItWorks.title: From scattered servers to one governed URL

stepsUser.d: Use your own account, or your team's SSO. No new identity to manage.
Browse your team's curated catalogue and add only the tools you're cleared for.

panelText.pickNote: You only see tools your admin assigned to your team.

stepsUser.d: Paste one URL into Claude, Cursor or Cline — your tools just work.

stepsAdmin.d: Add to your private registry, or pick from the 180+ curated starter pack.
BigMCP calls tools/list and indexes everything, with semantic search over the catalogue.
Curate tools per team with PRIVATE / ORGANIZATION / PUBLIC visibility.
Per-group keys with 7 granular scopes. bcrypt-hashed, bigmcp_sk_* format.
Every teammate connects Claude, Cursor or Cline with a single URL — and sees only their tools.

howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to unified MCP governance

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up with your email. Your credentials are encrypted and synced across all devices.

steps.title: Connect MCP Servers
steps.description: Add your existing MCP servers to BigMCP. Configure credentials and access policies for each server.

steps.title: Use & Compose Tools
steps.description: Simply use tools or combine them into powerful workflows. No complexity, just results delivered instantly.

marketplace.title: Your registry + a curated marketplace
marketplace.lead: Declare your private MCP servers. Or pick from a curated 180+ starter pack — npm, GitHub, Glama, Smithery. All in one search, behind one URL.

useCases.t: Connect public servers in one click
useCases.d: Add Gmail, Linear, Notion or Slack straight from the curated starter pack — credentials auto-detected.

useCases.t: Build custom tools on your stack
useCases.d: Wire BigMCP to Grist, Airtable, a Notion database or your internal API. Ship custom MCP tools for your team's widgets — tasks, projects, dashboards.
Your private registry only, a local LLM (Ollama, vLLM), and air-gap mode on. Nothing leaves your network.

features.title: Everything a team needs to run MCP in production

items.d: Register from any source — npm, pip, GitHub, Docker, HTTP, local binary. Auto-discovery via tools/list. Team vs personal visibility.
Tool Groups with PRIVATE / ORG / PUBLIC visibility, plus scoped API keys exposing only the tools you choose.
OAuth 2.0 + PKCE, JWT, MFA/TOTP, API keys (bcrypt), credentials encrypted at rest with Fernet.
Organization isolation with 4-tier RBAC and hierarchical credentials. Unlimited users and orgs.
Declare your private MCP servers and keep them entirely inside your network. Air-gap compatible, full sovereignty.
Natural language to workflow, a composition lifecycle, and durable steps that survive crashes and restarts.

features.subtitle: Built for teams that take MCP governance seriously

workflows.title: Compositions that survive crashes & restarts
workflows.body: A resumable executor persists every step in Postgres. Promote a validated composition and it becomes a first-class MCP tool. Five suspending step types pause and resume cleanly:
workflows.noteHtml: Plus non-suspending steps transform (LLM JSON extraction) and foreach (fan-out over a list) — shipped in 2.5.

items.d: Clock-driven resume at a future time
Call another composition, suspend until it ends

governance.title: Full control over who sees what
governance.lead: Four roles, hierarchical credentials, and immutable audit logs with HMAC-SHA256 integrity. Run a hardened, closed deployment with the marketplace disabled and custom servers only.

roles.d: Full control of the org, billing & members
Use assigned Tool Groups, run tools

comparison.title: Compared, on the axes that matter to a sovereign deployment
comparison.lead: We don't claim to be the only answer. Where BigMCP is built to win is autonomy — you choose the LLM, you hold the data, and you run the infrastructure. No proprietary lock-in, no per-seat gate.

selfHost.title: Nothing leaves your network
selfHost.lead: Self-host BigMCP with your own LLM. Everything else stays inside your network. Built for sensitive data, regulated industries, and sovereign deployments.

branding.lead: Ship a gateway your teams recognize as yours. Set a custom instance name, drop in your logo, and pick a primary color — on your own domain, in your own palette. No "powered by", no compromise.
branding.hint: recolors the entire page live. Scroll up and watch.

finalCta.title: One URL for every tool your agents need
finalCta.sub: Free and open source under AGPLv3. No user limits, no license keys. Self-host in minutes or try the live demo.
finalCta.subtitle: Self-hosted in minutes — autonomous MCP gateway, your LLM, your data.

footer.tagline: Open-source MCP gateway for organizations. Register, govern, and expose your MCP services to your teams — with full control over who sees what.

mobileDemo.title: Workflows that survive
mobileDemo.description: Compose multi-tool workflows once, expose them as first-class MCP tools, and let them suspend for human approval, an external webhook, or a future timestamp. The executor persists every step in Postgres — your composition resumes exactly where it left off after any restart.
features: 5 durable step types: elicit (ask), wait_until (clock), wait_callback (webhook), subcomposition (call), approval (four-eyes)
Promoted compositions become callable MCP tools for your whole team
Execute from any MCP client (Claude, Cursor, Continue.dev, Mistral Le Chat, n8n) with one URL
Live execution timeline at /app/compositions/executions with audit trail

phoneMockup.userMessage: Onboard new client: Acme Corp (contact: john@acme.com, sector: B2B SaaS)
phoneMockup.thinkingText: User created a custom workflow for complete client onboarding. Will execute across CRM, Drive, Gmail, and Slack systems.
phoneMockup.resultIntro: I've set up Acme Corp in all your systems:
phoneMockup.driveDetails: Complete structure with contracts and billing
phoneMockup.conclusion: Everything is ready to start collaboration with Acme Corp.

providers.title: Works with any OpenAI-compatible LLM
providers.subtitle: Any OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions endpoint works. Swap with one env var. Anthropic uses a non-OpenAI-compatible API and isn't supported as a provider.

airgap.title: Nothing leaves your network
airgap.description: Self-host BigMCP with your own LLM. Everything else stays inside your network. Built for sensitive data, regulated industries, and sovereign deployments.

challenge.title: The MCP Governance Challenge
challenge.subtitle: As your MCP ecosystem grows, managing tools becomes complex and risky
withoutItems: Each MCP server manages its own credentials
No centralized access control or auditing
withItems: Single governance layer for all MCPs

orgs.title: Sovereign by design
orgs.subtitle: Sober, factual assurances for public sector and regulated industries.

items.title: RGPD native
items.description: Data stays on your infrastructure. No third-party processor, no cross-border transfer by default.

items.title: Full audit
items.description: AGPLv3 source code: read everything, fork everything, audit everything. No closed-source modules.

items.title: Open referencing
items.description: SILL submission planned. Compatible with French public sector software referencing requirements.

items.title: Zero lock-in
items.description: No SaaS that can cut the service. Your deployment, your data, your kill switch.

community.title: Join the autonomous MCP movement
community.subtitle: BigMCP is built in the open. Issues, PRs, and discussions are welcome.
